summary: Email/SMS verifikacija za rezervacije - sve funkcionalnosti testirane. KRITIČAN BUG pronađen i popravljen u ReservationsTab.tsx (nedostajala 'enteredCode' state varijabla). Sve 15 backend testova prošlo. Admin panel Integracije tab funkcionalan. Mobilna app code screen sada radi ispravno.

issues: Submit button 'Pošalji rezervaciju' is positioned near bottom nav bar and requires form scrolling (via ScrollView.scrollTop) to avoid nav overlap. On smaller screens the button may not be fully visible without scrolling.

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: ReservationsTab.tsx was missing 'const [enteredCode, setEnteredCode] = useState("");' state declaration. setEnteredCode('') was called in handleSubmitForm after API success, causing ReferenceError caught by catch block showing Alert 'Serverska greška'. This prevented navigation to code screen. Fix applied at line 106.
testID='submit-reservation-btn' added to submit TouchableOpacity for future testability

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All features verified: admin Integracije tab, Resend/Twilio fields, save functionality, fallback code screen with shield icon + 6-digit code, code entry and verification

seed_data_creation: Multiple test reservations created during testing (TEST_* prefix) and cleaned up via teardown
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email/SMS verification feature fully tested and working. enteredCode missing useState bug was fixed. Backend fallback mode verified (show_code=true, verification_code 6 digits, sent_via=null when no Twilio/Resend configured). Admin panel Integracije tab shows Resend (API key + sender email) and Twilio (Account SID + Auth Token + phone number) sections with working save. Mobile code screen shows shield icon, 6-digit code, and 30-minute expiry warning. Code entry and verification flow verified end-to-end.
rca_of_issue: ROOT CAUSE: In ReservationsTab.tsx, state variable 'enteredCode' was used in 3 places (setEnteredCode('') in handleSubmitForm, enteredCode.length check in handleVerify, value={enteredCode} in TextInput) but 'const [enteredCode, setEnteredCode] = useState("");' was never declared in component state. REPRODUCTION: Fill reservation form and click 'Pošalji rezervaciju'. API returns 200 but form stays because JS catches ReferenceError from setEnteredCode call. MITIGATION: Added useState declaration. No other state variables appear to be missing.

test_verification.backend_api_fallback_show_code_true: PASS - API returns show_code=true, verification_code (6 digits), sent_via=null
test_verification.admin_panel_resend_fields: PASS - API Ključ, Email pošiljaoca fields visible
test_verification.admin_panel_twilio_fields: PASS - Account SID, Auth Token, Telefonski broj fields visible
test_verification.admin_panel_save_shows_success: PASS - Shows Aktivan badges after save
test_verification.mobile_app_code_screen_shows_code: PASS - 6-digit code visible in large purple text
test_verification.mobile_app_code_entry_and_verify: PASS - Entering correct code confirms reservation
